title: I love Miami, but you can't deny that nothing beats San Francisco when it comes to the amount of talent per square foot.

content.summary: I love Miami, but you can't deny that nothing beats San Francisco when it comes to the amount of talent per square foot. Founder Mode (@Founder_Mode_) . @victorcardenas of @slashapp ($370M+): San Francisco is the best place in the world to build a tech company. Borrowing from @paulg ’s essay on how cities shape and reward ambition, when a city consistently rewards builders, it naturally becomes a magnet for ambitious people. Over time, this shared mindset creates an environment where grueling 15 hour days and going the distance to build world class products are encouraged and reinforced. Video — https://nitter.net/Founder_Mode_/status/2035723967445492161#m
